response.overview: This is one of the summer camp productions created through a unique experiment: a shared premise “when an unseen ‘oni’ appears, people begin to disappear” was adapted and filmed separately by each group. Among them, this version is a solid, classic mystery that stays closest to the original concept. It is the first directorial work by newcomer Kazuki Yoshimura, and it leaves a lingering sense of unease long after viewing.
response.title: かくれろ
